subject: F1000 Monthly Update - March 2015
body:
To ensure you receive F1000 emails, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update  |  March 2015

----------------------------------------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
Faculty awards
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    

Our Faculty have been busy lately, winning a plethora of prestigious awards! Many congratulations to all Faculty Members, Section Heads and Head of Faculty on these achievements.

* Bruce Alberts wins AAAS Hauge-Abelson prize [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/03/03/bruce-alberts-wins-2014-aaas-hauge-abelson-prize/ ]
* Philippa Marrack wins Wolf Prize in Medicine [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/02/25/philippa-marrack-wins-2015-wolf-prize/ ]
* David Tilman takes the BBVA Foundation Frontiers of Knowledge Award [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/02/26/david-tilman-takes-bbva-foundation-frontiers-of-knowledge-award/ ]
* Jennifer Doudna wins 2015 Breakthrough Prize [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/02/16/jennifer-doudna-wins-2015-breakthrough-prize/ ]
* Brendan Crabb recognised in Australia Day honours [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/01/29/brendan-crabb-recognised-in-australia-day-honours/ ]
* Peter Walter given 2015 Vilcek Prize in biomedical science [ http://blog.f1000.com/2015/01/28/vilcek-prize-in-biomedical-science-2015/ ]


   F1000Prime                                
==================
  
Below is a selection of recommendations added by our Faculty of 10,000+ Members over the past month:

13 * 
The blind gatekeeper? 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/725287778?key=z4Ybr4IHUtfthVJ ]
Highly innovative science may be being missed by high-impact journals. Fourteen of the most-cited papers (in 1000) were all rejected from three elite journals.
Siler K, Lee K and Bero L.
Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A. 2015; 112:360-5

16 *
Silent assassin 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/725298274?key=vRvOsRPKrNn5iMx ]
A "genius device", the iChip, discovers a new antibiotic, Teixobactin, that attacks bacteria on two fronts - without detectable resistance.
Ling LL, Schneider T, Peoples AJ et al.
Nature. 2015; 517:455-9

6 *
Where should I send it? 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/725324668?key=5JR9zO2KpkD4l1F ]
The decision of where to submit a scientific manuscript is often a critical one. This study is a data-driven approach on how to improve your success in getting your papers published.
Salinas S and Munch SB.
PLoS ONE. 2015; 10:e0115451


F1000Prime Reports
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

Duality of lipid mediators in host response against Mycobacterium tuberculosis: good cop, bad cop 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/b/7/29/ ]
Recent findings demonstrate that striking the proper balance between the levels of lipoxin, PGE2 and leukotrienes is critical for successful control of Mycobacterium tuberculosis, suggesting several new drug targets in this difficult-to-treat infection.
F1000Prime Report by Dietzold J, Gopalakrishnan A and Salgame P [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/2090712096427166 ].
F1000Prime Rep 2015, 7:29

 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 --------------- 


---------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~
Come and meet us at EB 2015!
~~~~~~~~~

We'll be at the Experimental Biology (EB) 2015 conference in Boston from March 29-31. Please come and visit us at booth 541 - we'd love to chat and we have goodies to give away!


~~~~~~~~~
Do you work with antibodies? 
~~~~~~~~~

Publish your validations as Antibody Validation Articles (free of charge) and be part of F1000Research's growing article channel [ http://f1000research.com/article-collections/antibody-validation ]. 


---------------------- 

    
   F1000Research                      
======================

Our innovative open science publishing platform [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data. 

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:

RESEARCH ARTICLE
Subdivisions of the adult zebrafish pallium based on molecular marker analysis [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-308/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4m2 ]
Published: 17 Dec 2014
Ganz J, Kroehne V, Freudenreich D et al.
F1000Research 2014, 3:308

DATA NOTE
Strain-specific and pooled genome sequences for populations of Drosophila melanogaster from three continents [ http://f1000research.com/articles/4-31/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/515 ]
Published: 29 Jan 2015
Bergman C and Haddrill PR.
F1000Research 2015, 4:31

RESEARCH NOTE
Longevity of Atlantic Sharpnose Sharks Rhizoprionodon terraenovae and Blacknose Sharks Carcharhinus acronotus in the western North Atlantic Ocean based on tag-recapture data and direct age estimates [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-190/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4fj ]
Published: 27 Jan 2015
Frazier BS, Driggers III WB and Ulrich GF.
F1000Research 2014, 3:190

RESEARCH NOTE
Characterizing alpha helical properties of Ebola viral proteins as potential targets for inhibition of alpha-helix mediated protein-protein interactions [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-251/v3 ] [v3; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/50u ] 
Published: 27 Jan 2015
Chakraborty S, Rao BJ, Asgeirsson B et al.
F1000Research 2015, 3:251

 ---------------------------------------------
  Submit now to F1000Research          
  >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
 ---------------------------------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~ 
Guide to Open Science Publishing
~~~~~~~~~ 

Download our Guide to Open Science Publishing [ http://f1000.com/resources/F1000R_Guide_OpenScience.pdf ], with information about open access, open peer review, open data, and more.
 

     F1000Posters                 
======================

Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below is a selection:


NEUROLOGICAL DISORDERS   
Phoenix nest: starting a small company focused on Sanfilippo syndrome [ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097539 ]
Wood J and Ekins S.
F1000Posters 2015, 6:116  

ECOLOGY
Reef check California: citizen scientist divers monitor California's marine protected areas [ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097567 ]
Freiwald J.
F1000Posters 2015, 6:132

ECOLOGY
Engaging non-scientists in urban ecology: lessons learned from designing, implementing, and sustaining three place-based citizen science projects [ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097589 ]
Nation M and Elser M.
F1000Posters 2015, 6:146


  ----------------------------------------------
  Deposit now        
  >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
  ----------------------------------------------

----------------------

~~~~~~~~~
F1000Prime mobile app 
~~~~~~~~~

Use F1000Prime on the go with our user-friendly mobile app [ http://f1000.com/prime/mobile ]. Keep up to date with the best papers while on the move. Find out more [ http://f1000.com/prime/mobile ].


----------------------


-----------------------------------------------------   

You have received this message because you asked to receive the F1000 Monthly Update to your registered email address from Faculty of 1000. If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time. For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at info@f1000.com [ mailto:info@f1000.com ].

If this email is not displaying properly, please view in your usual browser.
